lesson.menu_desc: Signing, completion and reported speech -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Closing the Deal -- Signing & Reported Speech
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Simone Quiles de Santana Marques | Aula 16 -- Closing the Deal

listenings.text: Hi Simone, this is Daniel from the legal team, with an update before the closing on Friday. The partner told me that the price was final and that the deal would close this week. He said the agreement was ready and that both teams would sign it on Friday. Earlier today the client said she was happy with the terms and that she would attend the signing in person. Daniel said the effective date was the first of next month, so the contract would start then. He also told me that two witnesses would be present and that each party would countersign the last page. After the signing, the closing is complete, and the proceeds are transferred the same day. The partner said this was the smoothest deal of the year. Talk soon, and well done.

extra_audio.text: First, Daniel said the agreement was ready and that the price was final. Next, the client said she would attend the signing in person. Then, on Friday, both teams sign and two witnesses countersign the last page. After that, the closing is complete and the effective date starts the deal. Finally, the proceeds are transferred the same day, and Daniel said it was the smoothest deal of the year.
